subcodes.title: Words to the Master's entourage, spoken on 1912-07-27
subcodes.first_line: If there is any justice, then what I have done for the friends will become apparent. I have done all this through the bounty and assistance of the Blessed Beauty. Otherwise, what have we Persians in common with the Americans on top of this mountain and valley in Dublin?
subcodes.first_line_orig: اگر انصاف باشد ثابت میشود که برای احبای الهی من چه کرده ام و همهٴ اینها بعون و عنایت جمال مبارک بوده و الا ما اشخاص ایرانی با اهالی امریکا در دبلین بالای تل و کوه بظاهر چه مناسبتی داریم
subcodes.subjects: @East and West; communication between East and West, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
